name: OMPHALOMESENTERIC DUCT CYST

demographics.Etiology: persistence + dilatation of an omphalomesenteric / vitelline duct segment → joining
demographics.Histo: cyst lined by columnar mucin-secreting GI epithelium
demographics.Location: usually in close proximity to fetus

dominant_finding: umbilical cord cyst up to 6 cm in diameter
distribution: usually in close proximity to fetus
discriminating_features: umbilical cord cyst up to 6 cm in diameter
beneath amniotic surface of cord (= eccentric)

general: umbilical cord cyst up to 6 cm in diameter
beneath amniotic surface of cord (= eccentric)
